heroDescription: Edit images with Novita AI tools for background removal, object erasing, and image upscaling through production-ready APIs.
seoDescription: Explore Novita AI image tools for background removal, image erasing, and image upscaling. Compare API-ready image editing tools and open each model page for integration details.
overviewBody: Image Tools is Novita AI's collection of API-ready image editing utilities. Instead of representing one external model family, this collection groups practical image-to-image tools for common production workflows such as removing backgrounds, erasing unwanted regions, and improving image resolution.

Use this collection when the goal is not open-ended image generation, but a specific editing operation that can be integrated into product pipelines, creative automation, ecommerce workflows, or asset cleanup systems.
Each card links to a dedicated model page where developers can review the API behavior, pricing signals, and Playground entry point before implementation.

lineupSections.title: Background editing
lineupSections.description: Tools for isolating subjects and removing backgrounds from source images.
items: Use Image Remove Background when the main task is subject cutout or background isolation.
Useful for product imagery, profile assets, marketplace listings, and creative asset preparation.

lineupSections.title: Object removal and cleanup
lineupSections.description: Tools for removing unwanted visual regions from an image.
items: Use Image Eraser when a selected object, mark, or distracting region needs to be removed.
Best suited for targeted cleanup instead of regenerating the entire image.

lineupSections.title: Image enhancement
lineupSections.description: Tools for improving resolution and visual detail.
items: Use Image Upscaler when the input image needs higher resolution or clearer detail.
Useful for preparing generated or uploaded assets for larger displays, catalogs, and production use.

faq.question: Are Image Tools a single model family?
faq.answer: No. In Novita AI's current model configuration, Image Tools is a collection of image editing utilities rather than one external model family.

faq.question: Which Image Tools are currently available on Novita AI?
faq.answer: The current Image Tools collection includes Image Remove Background, Image Eraser, and Image Upscaler.

faq.question: How are Image Tools different from text-to-image models?
faq.answer: Text-to-image models generate new images from prompts. Image Tools operate on existing images for specific editing tasks such as background removal, object erasing, or upscaling.

models.name: image-remove-background
models.description: Remove backgrounds from source images for clean subject cutouts and production-ready visual assets.

models.name: image-upscaler
models.description: Upscale images to improve resolution and visual detail for larger-format or higher-quality outputs.

models.name: image-eraser
models.description: Erase unwanted objects or regions from an image while preserving the surrounding visual context.
